title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code across desktop, terminal, and VS Code environments. The example project is a Resume and Cover Letter Generator that provides personalized recommendations, and covers installation, configuration, and debugging of Claude Code workflows.
